text: Budget Direct Comprehensive covers trip cancellation up to $10,000 by default.
subclaims: Budget Direct Comprehensive covers trip cancellation.

text: If you lose your job, cancellation is covered — whether the redundancy was your choice or forced upon you.
subclaims: Job loss due to redundancy is a covered cancellation reason.
Voluntary redundancy (your own choice) is a covered cancellation reason.
Involuntary redundancy (forced upon you) is a covered cancellation reason.

text: The policy covers cancellations caused by COVID-19 and other pandemic events on the same basis as any other unexpected event.
subclaims: Pandemic cancellations are treated the same as other unexpected events.

text: You can increase your cancellation limit above $10,000 by selecting higher cover when you purchase.
subclaims: The cancellation limit can be increased above $10,000.
Higher limits are selected at purchase time.
